reviewerNotes: The questions focus on the constitutional articles (64-68 and 93-94) and the Rules of Procedure mentioned in the text. I have emphasized the technical distinctions between the Speaker and Vice-President regarding their election majorities, removal processes, and the specific role of the Panel of Chairpersons. The 'absence vs vacancy' distinction in Question 4 is particularly aligned with UPSC's style of testing procedural nuances.
